problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
